--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{"a":[{},{},{},{},{}],"b":[{"details":{"forename":"Jens"}},{"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"}}],"c":[{"details":{"forename":"David"}}],"d":[]},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":["a"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Stefan"}},"id":"1","subPath":[0]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Björn"}},"id":"1","subPath":[1]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Sergiy"}},"id":"1","subPath":[2]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"Eelco"}},"id":"1","subPath":[3]},{"data":{"details":{"forename":"David"}},"id":"1","subPath":[4]}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql--
